title: FE-06 Mutation Rules - Boundary & Negative Test Case Generation
description: Chi tiet toan bo mutation rules cho 2 pipeline rule-based: path parameter mutations va body mutations. Moi mutation tao 1 TestCase entity voi TestType = Boundary hoac Negative.

classificationRules.description: Quy tac phan loai mutation thanh Boundary hoac Negative TestType.
boundaryConditions: Overflow mutations (Int32.MaxValue+1, Int64.MaxValue, very large string, very large number).
Gia tri o ranh gioi range (min/max of data type).
negativeConditions: Tat ca mutation khong phai Boundary.
Empty body, malformed JSON, plain text.
Injection payloads, special characters, non-existent IDs.
Wrong type mutations for path parameters.

classifyPathMutationType.logic: if mutationType contains 'boundary' or 'zero' or 'max' or 'overflow' => Boundary. else => Negative.

bodyMutations.note: GET, DELETE, HEAD, OPTIONS endpoints KHONG sinh body mutations (empty body va malformed JSON chi apply cho POST/PUT/PATCH).

variants.label: malformed JSON (missing closing brace)
variants.description: {HttpMethod} {Path} - gui JSON thieu dau dong ngoac.

variants.label: malformed JSON (truncated value)
variants.description: {HttpMethod} {Path} - gui JSON bi cat gia tri.

variants.label: malformed JSON (plain text)
variants.description: {HttpMethod} {Path} - gui plain text thay vi JSON.

mutationTypes.fieldSelection: Chi cac field co IsRequired=true va Name khong rong.
mutationTypes.mutationLogic: Tao base body voi tat ca fields, sau do remove tung required field mot. Moi field bi remove = 1 mutation.

mutationTypes.fieldSelection: Tat ca fields co Name khong rong.
mutationTypes.mutationLogic: Tao base body voi tat ca fields, thay gia tri field bang wrong type. Moi field = 1 mutation.

example.label: age - wrong type (String instead of integer)
example.description: {HttpMethod} {Path} - truong 'age' gui kieu du lieu sai (expected: integer).

mutationTypes.fieldSelection: Fields co DataType la integer, int, long, number, float, double, decimal, string.
mutationTypes.mutationLogic: Tao base body voi tat ca fields, thay gia tri field bang overflow value. Chi applicable cho numeric va string types.
mutationTypes.note: Boolean, array, object fields KHONG co overflow mutation.
mutationTypes.totalVariants: N (= so luong applicable numeric/string fields)

mutationTypes.fieldSelection: Fields co Schema chua property 'enum' dang JSON array.
mutationTypes.mutationLogic: Extract enum values tu field schema. Generate invalid value = 'INVALID_ENUM_VALUE_' + random 8-char hex. Replace field value voi invalid enum.
mutationTypes.enumExtractionMethod: BodyMutationEngine.ExtractEnumValues(string schema): Parse JSON schema, read 'enum' property, extract string values.

example.label: status - invalid enum value
example.description: {HttpMethod} {Path} - truong 'status' gui gia tri ngoai enum (valid: [ACTIVE, INACTIVE, SUSPENDED]).

mutationTypes.totalVariants: N (= so luong fields co enum schema, thường ít)

schemaBasedMutations.description: Bo sung missing required field mutations tu raw JSON schema khi BodyParameters khong cover het.
logic: 3. Tim cac property co trong 'required' nhung KHONG co trong BodyParameters (by name, case-insensitive).
4. Tao missingRequired mutation cho moi property tim duoc.
5. MutatedBody = '{}' (empty object, vi khong co base body cho schema-only fields).
schemaBasedMutations.errorHandling: Catch JsonException -> skip schema-based mutations (schema is not valid JSON).

baseBodyConstruction.description: Xay dung base body object tu tat ca body parameters. Dung lam nen de moi mutation chi thay doi 1 field.
defaultValueStrategy: 1. Neu param co DefaultValue (khong empty) -> dung DefaultValue (parse JSON neu can).
2. Neu param co Examples (khong empty) -> dung Examples (parse JSON neu can).
baseBodyConstruction.jsonValueParser: TryParseJsonValue(string value, string dataType): try parse as JSON document, extract typed value. Catch JsonException -> return raw string.

pathParameterMutations.entryPoint: GenerateMutations(string name, string dataType, string format, string defaultValue)
pathParameterMutations.description: Generate mutation variants cho tung path parameter cua tung endpoint. Service nay nam trong ApiDocumentation module boundary.

mutationTypes.description: Gui null/empty string cho path parameter.
Gui empty string cho path parameter.
Gui gia tri o ranh gioi: 0, 1, -1, max cua data type.
Gui gia tri vuot max cua data type (vd: Int32.MaxValue + 1 cho int32 parameter).
Gui sai kieu du lieu (vd: 'abc' cho integer parameter, 'not-a-uuid' cho GUID parameter).
Gui payload injection (SQL injection patterns, script tags, special sequences).
Gui ky tu dac biet: unicode, emoji, whitespace, control characters.
Gui ID khong ton tai (random GUID cho UUID parameters, 999999 cho integer parameters).

request.bodyType: None (path mutation chi thay doi path, khong gui body)

request.body: mutation.MutatedBody (null for emptyBody null variant, empty string for empty variant, JSON for per-field variants)

mutationSummaryTable.description: Tong hop so luong mutations duoc sinh ra cho 1 endpoint voi N required fields, M total fields, K enum fields.

perField.overflow: ≤ M variants (chi applicable cho numeric/string fields)
perField.invalidEnum: ≤ K variants (chi applicable cho fields co enum schema)

exampleForEndpoint.description: POST /api/users voi 5 fields (3 required, 2 optional, 1 enum, 2 string, 2 integer)
